rules: DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, or Lato for headings.
Headlines > 32px MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Overlines/Labels MUST be uppercase + tiny + wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
NEVER use pure #000000; base is Deep Obsidian (#0A0A0A).
Use Electric Blaze (#FF3B30) for down trends and warnings.
Use Volt Blue (#007AFF) for primary actions.
Use Laser Green (#22C55E) for up trends and success states.
Ensure text meets APCA/WCAG standards. Do NOT use completely transparent backgrounds behind text.
Hover state color must be a lighter hue of the active state color, and ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover.

surfaces.usage: Sticky Headers, Floating Navs, Modal Overlays
Data-heavy Dashboards, Admin Panels, Feature Sections

surfaces.concept: A glowing gradient line that travels around the container edge using framer-motion or a moving background gradient.

textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) to break the digital flatness on the landing page.
shadows: Use sharp 1px borders instead of soft shadows for a 'Tactical Minimalism' look.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped or slightly rounded (rounded-md) with sharp inner contrasts. Primary: bg-[#007AFF] text-white hover:bg-[#3395FF].
components.cards: Flat background (#1E1E1E), 1px subtle border (border-white/10), no shadow. On hover: -translate-y-1, border color darkens/lightens slightly.
components.pricing_cards: 3-column layout. Use dark gray backgrounds (#1E1E1E). Highlight 'Pro/Elite' plan with vibrant Volt Blue border or The Tracing Beam effect. Price must be high-contrast white text.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select, Form. Ensure 1px solid stroke borders for a tactical look. Focus rings must be Volt Blue (ring-[#007AFF]).
components.navigation: Sticky header (z-50) using Glassmorphism. MUST include visible links on desktop (no hamburger menu hiding links on desktop).
components.toasts: Use Sonner component for notifications (e.g., signup success, email sent, trial started).

span_logic: Summary widgets (Remaining Credits, Trial Days): col-span-1
Main Chart (Revenue/Trading Data): col-span-2 row-span-2 or col-span-3
dashboard.rules: Every pixel must be utilized. Use h-full on children to ensure they stretch to match their neighbors.

marketing_landing.grid_classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 lg:gap-12

layouts_and_grids.spacing: Use Tailwind scale generously (p-6, p-8, p-12). Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.

requirements: Hover states on all interactive elements.
Entrance animations (staggered for lists) using framer-motion.
Micro-animations for feedback (e.g., credit reduction counter).
rules: Use specific transitions: `transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease`.
Minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text, 3:1 for large text.
Explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white).
Focus states must have HIGHER contrast.

image_urls.description: Abstract candlestick stock chart on dark screen
Modern typography logo on light surface

rules: Images MUST NOT exceed 80vh on mobile devices.

libraries_and_tools.icons: lucide-react (already installed) or @phosphor-icons/react for dense dashboards.

rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize reading Shadcn UI component patterns. Use Shadcn components for forms, select, dialogs, etc., but strip Vercel look and apply tactical dark theme borders/colors.
Implement a post-signup Membership Modal using Shadcn Dialog. It must show plans and a 'Skip to 7-Day Trial' button.
Create an Admin Panel (accessible via separate route) showing users, membership status, credits, trial days left.
The Dashboard must show remaining credits and trial days clearly using col-span-1 summary widgets.
Apply Deep Obsidian (#0A0A0A) as the main body background, not pure black.
Do not use markdown blocks when writing the JSON configuration, follow raw text.
Ensure 'TrendTracker Pro' branding is visible in the Navbar.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Make creative, distinctive frontends.
DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetrical or precise grid layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) where instructed.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖🧠💭) for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
DO NOT use HTML-based components for advanced interactions (use Shadcn instead).
